dashboards_data.name: Network Flows Connections Analysis
dashboards_data.description: Network flow log analysis built on the network_story preset. Covers all traffic product types — geo-distribution, top processes, protocol analysis, port usage, hourly trends, unsigned process detection, IMDS access, causality chain anomalies, and full flow details.

data.phrase:
preset = network_story
| alter ns_str = to_string(action_network_success)
| filter ns_str in ($network_success)
| filter add(action_total_download, action_total_upload) >= to_number($min_transfer)
| filter (action_remote_ip not in (null, ""))
| filter agent_hostname in ($hostname) or agent_hostname in (null, "")
| filter action_remote_ip in ($remote_ip)
| filter action_remote_ip in ($public_ip) or action_local_ip in ($public_ip)
| filter dst_action_external_hostname in ($dst_hostname) or dst_action_external_hostname in (null, "")
| filter action_local_ip in ($local_ip) or action_local_ip in (null, "")
| filter actor_process_image_name in ($actor_process) or actor_process_image_name in (null, "")
| filter actor_effective_username in ($username) or actor_effective_username in (null, "")
| filter associated_products in ($associated_products)
// | filter action_session_duration > 0 or action_total_download > 0
| alter port_str = format_string("%d", action_remote_port)
| filter port_str in ($remote_port)
| alter protocol = if(
    action_app_id_transitions contains "ssl",  "SSL",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tls",  "TLS",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "http", "HTTP",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "dns",  "DNS",
    // TCP port-based
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (22) or action_local_port in (22)), "SSH",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (23) or action_local_port in (23)), "Telnet",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (21) or action_local_port in (21)), "FTP",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (25, 587, 465) or action_local_port in (25, 587, 465)), "SMTP",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (110) or action_local_port in (110)), "POP3",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (143, 993) or action_local_port in (143, 993)), "IMAP",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (80, 8080, 8000) or action_local_port in (80, 8080, 8000)), "HTTP",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (443, 8443) or action_local_port in (443, 8443)), "HTTPS",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (389) or action_local_port in (389)), "LDAP",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (636) or action_local_port in (636)), "LDAPS",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (445, 139) or action_local_port in (445, 139)), "SMB",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (3389) or action_local_port in (3389)), "RDP",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (5985, 5986) or action_local_port in (5985, 5986)), "WinRM",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (1433) or action_local_port in (1433)), "MSSQL",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (3306) or action_local_port in (3306)), "MySQL",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (5432) or action_local_port in (5432)), "PostgreSQL",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (6379) or action_local_port in (6379)), "Redis",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp" and (action_remote_port in (27017) or action_local_port in (27017)), "MongoDB",
    // UDP port-based
    action_app_id_transitions contains "udp" and (action_remote_port in (53) or action_local_port in (53)), "DNS",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "udp" and (action_remote_port in (67, 68) or action_local_port in (67, 68)), "DHCP",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "udp" and (action_remote_port in (123) or action_local_port in (123)), "NTP",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "udp" and (action_remote_port in (161, 162) or action_local_port in (161, 162)), "SNMP",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "udp" and (action_remote_port in (500) or action_local_port in (500)), "ISAKMP",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "udp" and (action_remote_port in (4500) or action_local_port in (4500)), "NAT-T",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "udp" and (action_remote_port in (1194) or action_local_port in (1194)), "OpenVPN",
    // Generic fallbacks
    action_app_id_transitions contains "udp",  "UDP",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "tcp",  "TCP",
    action_app_id_transitions contains "icmp", "ICMP",
    to_string(action_network_protocol) = "47", "GRE",
    "Other"
  )
| filter protocol in ($protocol) or protocol = "Other"
| iploc action_remote_ip loc_country
| filter loc_country in ($remote_country)
| alter display_ip = if(action_local_ip = "0.0.0.0" or action_local_ip = null or action_local_ip = "", agent_ip_addresses, action_local_ip)
| filter display_ip not in (null, "")
| fields action_total_download, action_total_upload, display_ip
| comp count() as Connections, sum(action_total_download) as Total_Download_B, sum(action_total_upload) as Total_Upload_B by display_ip
| sort desc Connections
| limit 20
| view graph type = pie subtype = full xaxis = display_ip yaxis = Connections
